meta.title: Process savings calculator — Industrial companies and distribution
meta.description: Calculate in 2 minutes how much money and time you are wasting on manual processes. For industrial, distribution and logistics companies.

sectionSolution.heading: If any of this resonates with you…
sectionSolution.verticalsLead: These are all DIGITAL problems across these three verticals

sectionOfrecemos.heading: Fair enough — what do we offer?
sectionOfrecemos.subtitle: Our services
sectionOfrecemos.s1title: We build digital, automated systems that take repetitive human work out of the loop
sectionOfrecemos.s1body: We build digital systems in place of the work you and your team do today that burns time and does not add real value to the business. Saving time on work that should be automated is a basic need. Let a machine run the repeatables while you invest in what actually matters.
sectionOfrecemos.s2title: We add intelligence to your digital processes so you can make better calls
sectionOfrecemos.s2body: We build flows that can decide in a 100% autonomous (or near-autonomous) way, so no one has to spend hours gathering information, processing it, interpreting it and only then choosing. We define clear, business-specific criteria and then automate their application, end to end, with the guardrails you want.
sectionOfrecemos.s3title: We make your company's digital operations easier to read
sectionOfrecemos.s3body: We cut through the fog of your digital process landscape, what it is for, and where it pays off, so you and the business always know which tool is in play, why, and at what value. We ground that in numbers whenever it helps you steer better.

sectionCta.title: Which of these is your case?
sectionCta.subtitle: Tell us. In two minutes we will tell you if we can help you.

sectionPainList.heading: Do any of these problems sound familiar?

quienes.title: Who we are
quienes.subtitle: Your partner to modernize operations without getting lost along the way
quienes.lead: We are a team of software engineers and automated systems architects.
quienes.body1: We use the latest market technologies — including artificial intelligence — to empower small and medium-sized businesses in their internal and external workflows.
quienes.body2: No fluff, no empty promises. Concrete, measurable solutions tailored to your business.

comoTrabajamos.heading: How we work
comoTrabajamos.subtitle: Because the system amplifies the result
comoTrabajamos.s1body: We identify the problems slowing down your operations and the improvements you can implement.
comoTrabajamos.s2body: We present concrete options with estimated benefits: time saved or money recovered.
comoTrabajamos.s3body: We work with you collaboratively until you have a clear picture of what we are going to build and how.
comoTrabajamos.s4body: We deliver a first working system — what others call an MVP, we call it an MVS — so you see results fast.
comoTrabajamos.s5body: We complete the solution while you can see at every step what state it is in, with partial deliveries and no surprises.
comoTrabajamos.s6body: We guide the rollout so the solution fits your real processes from day one.
comoTrabajamos.s7body: If needed, we train your team. We leave the system fully operational and ready for you.
comoTrabajamos.s8body: Weeks or months later, the results speak for themselves: less time, fewer errors, more money on the table.

footer.taglineLead: We optimize chaos to create clarity in your business. Clarity saves

contact.dialog: How do you prefer to contact?

servicios.moreButton: Tell me more about this solution

chat.initial: Hi, I'm Kromi, the Kroomix assistant. In two minutes I will help you detect where there may be an opportunity for improvement in your operations.\n\nWhat is your name, what company are you from and what do you do?
chat.limitBody: With what you have told me we already have enough context. The next step is to speak directly.
chat.newThreadTitle: You have already used the {max} new conversations available
chat.errorGeneric: There has been an error. Please try again.
chat.hint: Shift + Enter for new line. The data you share is used only for this diagnosis.

problemas.label: Problems
problemas.heading: What holds your business back every day
problemas.body: Manual processes, systems that don't talk to each other, information scattered across emails, WhatsApp and spreadsheets. We know exactly what this looks like from the inside.

mejoras.label: Improvements
mejoras.heading: You know what to improve, but you lack the time or know-how
mejoras.body: There are processes that work, but could or should work better—freeing more time for more important tasks.

dinero.label: Money
dinero.heading: You lose money on tasks that do not work and can be optimized
dinero.body: Every unsolved problem has a cost, whether you see it or not — and today everything can be measured and improved.

chatCaso.l1: I have seen the case «{titulo}» on your website and I want you to explain this solution applied to my company well.
chatCaso.l4: If you don't already have context about me (name, company, what we do, and approximate team size), ask me first in a few questions. When you have it, develop the solution in detail and contextualized to our business.
